project: Apex Roofing Co. — Roofing Contractor Website

tech_stack.styling: Tailwind CSS v4 + CSS custom properties

frontend_constraints.description: Mobile-first responsive design across all routes
frontend_constraints.evidence: All page briefs declare responsive intent per breakpoint. MobileBottomNav declared for < 1024px. Container widths use token-based max-width system.

frontend_constraints.description: Design tokens — no raw hex/px/ms values in specs
frontend_constraints.evidence: All design-system.md, component specs, and page briefs reference CSS custom properties (--color-*, --font-size-*, --motion-duration-*). Raw values only in design-system.tokens.json as the source of truth.

frontend_constraints.description: Content keys — no inline strings in specs
frontend_constraints.evidence: All page briefs and component specs reference content-library keys (e.g., home.hero.headline_1). content.en.json contains all resolved values.
design-system.md declares full [data-theme='dark'] CSS var block. ThemeSwitcher component declared in SiteHeader.md and MobileBottomNav.md.

frontend_constraints.description: MobileBottomNav (icon tab bar) declared for < lg breakpoints
frontend_constraints.evidence: components/MobileBottomNav.md — 5-tab icon bar, fixed bottom, safe-area-inset-bottom, body padding-bottom required.

frontend_constraints.description: AuthModal declared as primary auth surface
frontend_constraints.evidence: No auth flow required for this project (roofing contractor site). No sign-in/sign-up routes planned.
Deterministic default attribution is declared in content-library.md and SiteFooter.md: Built and maintenance by Growrix OS (https://www.growrixos.com). Contract remains brief-overridable.

frontend_constraints.description: Every hero spec declares full-bleed layout, text reveal animation, trust chip contrast, gradient overlay ≥ 0.55
frontend_constraints.evidence: visual-reference-pack.md: all 8 hero specs declare full-bleed or surface equivalent, gradient opacity ≥ 0.55, trust chip contrast 9.4:1 AAA, text reveal motion reference to motion-system.md.

frontend_constraints.description: Minimum page section density: ≥ 5 per public route, ≥ 7 for flagship home
frontend_constraints.evidence: Home: 8 sections. Service pages: 6–7 each. Emergency: 5. Areas/Reviews/About: 5–6. Legal pages: min_sections_exempt declared. All counts verified in page briefs.

frontend_constraints.description: Visual differentiation map present, no two HIGH routes share a visual signature hash
frontend_constraints.evidence: visual-differentiation-map.md declares unique VD-* hashes for all routes. Route-pair delta matrix confirms non-trivial differences.

frontend_constraints.description: Per-route briefs avoid prescribed component names, use outcome + slots + palette shape
frontend_constraints.evidence: All pages/*.md use outcomes-first structure, required content slots with category tags, and composition primitives (not component names). Composition guidance sections describe primitives (Stack/Grid/Frame etc.), not HTML/React component names.

frontend_constraints.description: Media integrity — every key hero has fallback declared
frontend_constraints.evidence: visual-reference-pack.md §3 Fallback Policy declares primary + fallback for every key conversion surface. next/image onError fallback policy stated.
content.en.json now uses complete draft website copy with realistic defaults; placeholder markers and unresolved agency tokens removed from user-facing values.
footer.attribution.* keys are populated with deterministic default values and referenced in footer specs.

accessibility_constraints.description: WCAG 2.1 AA contrast — all fg/bg pairs
accessibility_constraints.evidence: design-system.md §Contrast Audit table: all primary text pairs ≥ 4.5:1. Trust chips declared 9.4:1. Hero text on overlay backgrounds ≥ 8:1.
Declared in master-ui-architecture.md accessibility posture and home.md accessibility plan. Applies to all pages via shared layout.

accessibility_constraints.description: Single H1 per page, correct heading hierarchy
accessibility_constraints.evidence: All page briefs declare H1 content key. Heading hierarchy H1→H2→H3 specified per page.

accessibility_constraints.description: Keyboard navigation — all interactive elements reachable and operable
accessibility_constraints.evidence: interaction-matrix.md declares keyboard behavior per interaction class. BeforeAfterSlider.md declares arrow key support. FAQ accordion declares keyboard pattern. MobileBottomNav declares focus-visible ring.

accessibility_constraints.description: ARIA — landmark structure on all pages
accessibility_constraints.evidence: All page briefs declare landmark structure: header, main, section[aria-label], footer. master-ui-architecture.md §Accessibility Posture.
components/BeforeAfterSlider.md: full ARIA slider role declared with valuemin=0, valuemax=100, valuenow=50 initial.

accessibility_constraints.description: Form inputs: label elements, aria-required, aria-describedby for errors
accessibility_constraints.evidence: components/QuoteFormWidget.md and pages/contact.md and pages/quote.md all declare label elements, aria-required, role=alert on error messages.

accessibility_constraints.description: Images: meaningful alt text, decorative images aria-hidden
accessibility_constraints.evidence: visual-reference-pack.md §Photography Direction: all hero images carry descriptive alt. Background/decorative media: aria-hidden='true' declared in relevant page briefs.
motion-system.md: full reduced-motion policy table. Every macro effect and micro-animation has a reduced-motion fallback declared. Page briefs cross-reference motion-system.md.

accessibility_constraints.description: Color not used as the only means of conveying information
accessibility_constraints.evidence: Emergency repair page: urgency is communicated via text ('24/7', 'Emergency') not color alone. Error states: inline text messages, not color-only. Service type badges use text label + color.
MobileBottomNav.md: each tab 44px min height. CTA buttons: min-height 48px declared in design-system.md tokens. Phone CTA on emergency page: 48px+ tap target.

accessibility_constraints.description: Focus visible styles on all interactive elements
accessibility_constraints.evidence: design-system.md declares --focus-ring token. All interactive elements in component specs declare focus-visible treatment. No outline:none without focus-visible replacement.

open_questions: OQ-1: brand.name — working draft 'Apex Roofing Co.' — client must confirm legal business name
OQ-2: brand.license_number — draft TX-RC-847219 — client must confirm legal license number
OQ-3: brand.phone — draft (512) 555-0198 — client must confirm primary number
OQ-4: brand.service_area_name — draft 'Greater Austin area' — client to confirm exact service geography
OQ-5: brand.founded_year — draft 2006 — client to confirm
OQ-6: brand.project_count — draft '2,400+' — client to confirm
OQ-8: Google Reviews integration — is Google Places API key available? Or will reviews be manually entered in Sanity CMS?
OQ-9: Full FAQ set — current list is publish-ready draft; client to expand/approve if needed
OQ-10: Team bios and photos — required for /about page — client to supply
OQ-11: Service detail body copy — full narratives for all 4 service pages — copywriter or client to supply
OQ-12: Full area list — client to supply all city/neighborhood names for final local SEO coverage
OQ-13: Blog phase — is the blog in scope for Phase 1 or Phase 2?
OQ-14: Individual /areas/[slug] subpages — in scope? Required for per-area SEO.
